title: Voluntary scheme aggregate net sales and payment information: November 2025
body: "This document sets out the NHS’s quarterly aggregate net sales and payment information on pharmaceuticals for November 2025.  The 2024 voluntary scheme for branded medicines pricing, access and growth (VPAG) is an agreement between the Department of Health and Social Care, NHS England and the Association of the British Pharmaceutical Industry that aims to:   promote better patient outcomes and a healthier population support UK economic growth contribute to a financially sustainable NHS   "
